differentials.name: WITH ELEVATION OF BLADDER FLOOR [Pelvic lipomatosis]
Pelvic hematoma Cause:   trauma, anticoagulant therapy, spontaneous rupture of blood vessels, blood dyscrasia
differentials.raw: Pelvic hematoma Cause:   trauma, anticoagulant therapy, spontaneous rupture of blood vessels, blood dyscrasia (rare), bleeding neoplasm (rare)
